title: Regal Studio Presents: My Super Paranoid Girlfriend
original_title: Regal Studio Presents: My Super Paranoid Girlfriend
overview: Chelsea keeps her secret of being a superhero from her boyfriend. When they get into trouble, she immediately transforms into Super Babe, much to Prince's surprise, and it becomes an obstacle to their love.
